hero.location: Art Gallery of New South Wales, Sydney, Australia

about.tagline:
One Room. One Day.
The Minds That
Move Markets.
about.description: Livewire Live returns for its milestone 10th edition. Australia's most anticipated investment event brings together the country's best fund managers, strategists, and market thinkers for a full day of high-signal keynotes, live debates, and unscripted conversations you won't find anywhere else.

speakers.tbaSubtext: Australia's most respected fund managers and market leaders — live on stage, unfiltered and unscripted. The full lineup drops soon. Register below to be first to know.

highlights.headline:
Voices That Shaped
Our Thinking
highlights.subtitle: For over a decade, Livewire Live has brought together the most respected names in funds management — delivering the sharpest insights, boldest calls, and most actionable ideas to Australia's leading investors.

register.headline:
Be First to
Know & Register
register.subtext: Tickets aren't on sale yet — but they will be soon, and they go fast. Drop your email below to be the first notified when tickets open, and get early access to speaker announcements.

partners.ctaTitle: Put Your Brand at the Centre of Australian Investing
partners.ctaSub: Reach some of Australia's most influential investors, advisers, and fund managers in a single day.
